今天的天气真好，适合出去散步。.ref: The weather is really nice today, perfect for going out for a walk.
今天的天气真好，适合出去散步。.out: The weather is really nice today, perfect for going out for a walk.

请把这份报告打印出来，下午我要用它开会。.ref: Please print out this report; I'll need it for the meeting this afternoon.
请把这份报告打印出来，下午我要用它开会。.out: Please print out this report; I'll have to print it for the next week.

这家咖啡馆的拿铁咖啡非常香浓，推荐你尝尝。.ref: The latte at this café is very rich and aromatic; I recommend you try it.
这家咖啡馆的拿铁咖啡非常香浓，推荐你尝尝。.out: This coffee is very rich, and it's very acidic; I recommend you try it for this café.

明天上午九点，我们在公司大门口集合出发。.ref: We'll gather at the company's main gate at 9 AM tomorrow to set off.
明天上午九点，我们在公司大门口集合出发。.out: I found a way to set up tomorrow tomorrow morning; I found a way to set off.

这个项目的预算需要重新调整，因为原材料价格上涨了。.ref: The budget for this project needs to be readjusted because the price of raw materials has increased.
这个项目的预算需要重新调整，因为原材料价格上涨了。.out: The budget for this project is very expensive; the price of this material should be increased.
